message:
feat(insights): flatten insights output to match Go top-level field layout

Go legacy bv outputs insight categories (Bottlenecks, Cycles, Hubs,
Authorities, etc.) at the JSON top level. Rust was nesting them inside
an "insights" object. Flatten via serde(flatten) on the Insights struct
and rename fields to PascalCase to match Go:

- bottlenecks → Bottlenecks
- cycles → Cycles
- critical_path → CriticalPath
- hubs → Hubs
- authorities → Authorities
- cores → Cores
- slack → Slack
- influencers → Influencers
- articulation_points → Articulation
- eigenvector → Eigenvector
- status → Stats

Update all test references across conformance, schema, e2e, and stress
suites. All 78 conformance, 62 e2e, 61 schema, 49 stress tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
